original_text:
Paraguay Vs Australia Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Socceroos Seal Knockout Spot After Goalless Draw
Paraguay Vs Australia Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Australia reached the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage after a goalless draw with Paraguay, who kept their qualification hopes alive on four points as it happened at the Bay Area Stadium
araguay's Andres Cubas (14) is challenged by Australia's Connor Metcalfe (8) during the World Cup Group D soccer match between Paraguay and Australia in Santa Clara, Calif., near San Francisco, Thursday, June 25, 2026 (AP Photo/Jeff Chiu)
Paraguay Vs Australia Highlights, FIFA World Cup 2026: Australia booked their place in the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage after playing out a disciplined 0-0 draw with Paraguay in their final Group D fixture. With both sides aware that a point would strengthen their qualification hopes, the match unfolded as a cautious tactical battle with few clear-cut chances. The Socceroos controlled possession for long spells and created their best opportunity when Jordan Bos tested goalkeeper Orlando Gill from distance, while Paraguay looked most threatening on the counter through substitute Mauricio and Julio Enciso. Neither defence was seriously troubled as both teams prioritised shape over risk. The result secured Australia second place in the group, while Paraguay finished on four points and remained in contention to qualify as one of the tournament's best third-placed teams.
LIVE UPDATES
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Hello!
Greetings, we are back with our FIFA World Cup 2026 live blog as Paraguay and Australia face-off in the Group D finale. The action is about to begin, so stay tuned for all the live updates from Bay Area Stadium.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Match Details
Competition: FIFA World Cup 2026, Group D (Matchday 3)
Venue: San Francisco Bay Area Stadium, Santa Clara
Kickoff Time: 7:30 AM IST (June 26, 2026)
Referee: Clément Turpin (France)
Assistant Referees: Nicolas Danos (France) and Benjamin Pagès (France)
Fourth Official: Oshane Nation (Jamaica)
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Live Streaming Details
The FIFA World Cup 2026 will be telecast live on Unite8 Sports network on television. For live streaming, one can catch the action on the Zee5 app and website.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Group D Scenario
As the FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage reaches its conclusion, Group D presents a high-stakes scenario where the USA have already secured the top spot and an automatic berth in the Round of 32. The focus now shifts entirely to the decisive showdown between Australia and Paraguay at the San Francisco Bay Area Stadium. Both teams enter the match level on three points, essentially turning this fixture into a virtual playoff for the second-place seed. Australia currently hold the advantage for that runner-up spot by virtue of a superior goal difference; therefore, a win or a draw are enough to guarantee their advancement. Conversely, Paraguay must secure an outright victory to overtake the Socceroos and seal their place in the knockout rounds, as a draw leaves them vulnerable to falling behind on goal differential. Meanwhile, Türkiye have been eliminated from contention but are set to play the USA in Los Angeles, looking to end their tournament campaign on a positive note.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Starting XIs
Australia (3-4-2-1): 18 - Beach | 3 - Circati, 19 - Souttar (C), 25 - Herrington | 16 - Behich, 13 - O'Neill, 22 - Irvine, 5 - Bos | 8 - Metcalfe, 20 - Volpato | 17 - Irankunda
Paraguay (5-4-1): 12. Gill | 26 - Maidana, 3 - Alderete, 15 - G.Gomez, 2 - Velazquez, 4 - Caceres | 19 - Enciso, 23 - Galarza, 14 - Cubas, 8 - D.Gomez | 21 - Avalos
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Kick Off!
We're underway! The final Group D clash begins as Paraguay and Australia battle for a place in the FIFA World Cup knockout stage, with everything still to play for.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 56' PAR 0-0 AUS
Paraguay are sitting deep and showing little urgency going forward. A draw is enough to send both sides into the knockout stage, and it's beginning to look like neither team wants to take unnecessary risks. Australia continue to see more of the ball, but clear chances remain scarce.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 37' PAR 0-0 AUS
Bos cuts in from the left onto his stronger foot and lets fly from distance, but it's a comfortable save for Gill, who gathers the effort cleanly. Not the fiercest strike, yet it's Australia's first meaningful attempt in quite some time as they finally test the Paraguayan goalkeeper.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Halftime! PAR 0-0 AUS
The two sides head into the break locked at 0-0 after a cautious opening 45 minutes. Australia have enjoyed more possession and territory but have struggled to create clear-cut chances against Paraguay's disciplined defensive setup. With a draw enough to send both teams through to the knockout stage, neither side has taken unnecessary risks, leaving the contest finely balanced for the second half.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Second Half Starts!
The second half is underway! Paraguay make the first change of the match, introducing Mauricio for Maidana on the wing, while Australia stick with the same XI as both sides continue their push for a knockout-stage place.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 62' PAR 0-0 AUS
Paraguay are beginning to threaten on the counterattack. Substitute Mauricio has injected fresh pace down the flank, combining well with Julio Enciso to stretch the Australian defence. The Socceroos, meanwhile, are struggling to keep hold of possession as the momentum starts to shift.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: 83' PAR 0-0 AUS
The tempo has dropped again, with both sides showing little urgency going forward. Neither Australia nor Paraguay are committing too many players in attack, aware that the current 0-0 scoreline is enough to send both teams through to the FIFA World Cup knockout stage.
Paraguay Vs Australia LIVE Score, FIFA World Cup 2026: Fulltime! PAR 0-0 AUS
It finishes goalless after a tense, tactical battle with few clear-cut chances at either end. Australia controlled much of the possession but couldn't find a way past Paraguay's disciplined defence, while the South Americans remained content to threaten on the counter. The point is enough to secure the Socceroos second place in Group D and a place in the knockout stage. Paraguay finish on four points and remain in a strong position to qualify as one of the best third-placed teams, though their fate could still depend on results elsewhere and goal difference.
